characters.name: A-ou
characters.description: A-ouKiddy GradeAndRōmajiEiouDebutAnimeKiddy Grade Episode 10Kiddy Girl-AND Episode 7Voice ActorsJapaneseTetsu InadaEnglishSteve SandersCharacter InformationRaceHumanGenderMaleAge19Eye colourGreenHair colourWhite / Light grayPersonal InformationRankS-ClassPartnerUn-ouGuarding robotGanadorShipSalyutES AbilityAmplifierA-ou is an ES member and partner of Un-ou. Kiddy Girl-AND Episode 7 A-ou (unlike his partner) has a stronger sense of honour and justice. He is also more of a pacifist, and he often speaks in a profound and meaningful manner, giving him a rather preachy presence among other people.

characters.name: Dextera
characters.description: DexteraKiddy GradeVersusAndRōmajiDexteraKatakanaデクステラDebutMangaKiddy Grade VersusAnimeKiddy Grade Episode 1Kiddy Grade 2 PilotKiddy Girl-AND Episode 24Voice ActorsJapaneseHirotaka SuzuokiEnglishVic MognognaCharacter InformationRaceHumanGenderMaleAge18Eye colourRedHair colourRedPersonal InformationRankS-ClassES MemberPartnerSinistraGuarding robotZephyrusShipCenturionES AbilityAnywhereTheme colourGray / RedDextera has a reputation for being the victor of numerous battles in the past. He also has strong leadership characteristics. The right hand man of Eclipse, he has a long period of respect among the GOTT. The abilities of both him and Sinistra seem to be a mystery. However, both have plenty of strength and speed. Kiddy Grade 2 Pilot Kiddy Girl-AND Episode 24

characters.name: Dionie
characters.description: DionieisLumière's 2nd clone. She died along with her partnerDuerry. Her full name isDionie II Lumière.Her predecessor isUni-ace, while her successors areTroisienneandQ-Feuille. Her birthday is April 02, SC0360. She is a day younger than her partner.
